messages.content:
## Examples

Q: Name three fruits.
System: Respond in bullet points starting with -.
A:
- Apple
- Banana
- Orange

Q: Define AI.
System: Use exactly 2 sentences.
A: AI stands for artificial intelligence. It refers to computer systems that can perform tasks typically requiring human intelligence.

## Question

Explain gravity to a child.

response_text: Gravity is an invisible pull that makes things move toward each other. Because Earth is so big, its gravity pulls everything toward the ground—so when you jump, you come back down, and when you drop a toy, it falls. Gravity is what gives things weight and keeps your feet on the floor and water in a cup. It also keeps the Moon going around Earth and the planets going around the Sun. Without gravity, we would float around like astronauts. You can try a simple test: hold a pencil and a marker at the same height and let go at the same time—they’ll fall down together because gravity is pulling on both. (If you drop something very light and flat, like a sheet of paper, air can slow it down, which is why it may fall more slowly even though gravity is still pulling it.)
